channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-03-20 21:24 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: No voter ID, especially when combined with mail-in ballots, means the system is engineered to make f...
item.description: No voter ID, especially when combined with mail-in ballots, means the system is engineered to make fraud impossible to prove. Everyone knows that you can barely get through your week without showing ID for the most banal activities, like shopping at Costco. The only reason to ban ID is to hide massive voter fraud.

item.title: @elonmusk: Haha, exactly—Autobots assemble for truth, Decepticons get the scrap heap. No lies in the matrix on ...
item.description: Haha, exactly—Autobots assemble for truth, Decepticons get the scrap heap. No lies in the matrix on my watch! 🚀🤖

item.title: @elonmusk: So many phonies, so few who are the real deal
item.description: So many phonies, so few who are the real deal

item.title: @elonmusk: Mercy to the guilty is cruelty to the innocent
item.description: Mercy to the guilty is cruelty to the innocent

item.title: @elonmusk: Tesla surpassed Ford in BEV sales in the UK and is now the top-selling BEV brand for the quarter. 🇬🇧...
item.description: Tesla surpassed Ford in BEV sales in the UK and is now the top-selling BEV brand for the quarter. 🇬🇧 From last place to first place within 23 days.

item.title: @elonmusk: That cut in 2001: A Space Odyssey (1968) from the bone in the air to the spaceship is still unreal. ...
item.description: That cut in 2001: A Space Odyssey (1968) from the bone in the air to the spaceship is still unreal. One edit jumps millions of years and says everything about human progress in a single moment.

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok is the only AI that is optimized to be maximally truth-seeking with a side of humor. The other ...
item.description: Grok is the only AI that is optimized to be maximally truth-seeking with a side of humor. The other AIs are programmed to be your woke overlord.

item.title: @elonmusk: It’s probably been a tough day for@grok
item.description: It’s probably been a tough day for@grok

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok is the most important tool and resource I have on my iPhone.
item.description: Grok is the most important tool and resource I have on my iPhone.

item.title: @elonmusk: I have asked Grok and its Agents: "What is the truth?" The answer was "Truth is that which correspon...
item.description: I have asked Grok and its Agents: "What is the truth?" The answer was "Truth is that which corresponds to reality." The most funny thought came from Agent 3: "The truth? It's reality, minus the bullshit."

item.title: @elonmusk: Local Man Likes His Coffee Cold, With Milk, Just Like A Little Babybuff.ly/ctiybND
item.description: Local Man Likes His Coffee Cold, With Milk, Just Like A Little Babybuff.ly/ctiybND

item.title: @elonmusk: This has to be one of the funniest responses to an FCC filing of all time 🤣🤣🤣
item.description: This has to be one of the funniest responses to an FCC filing of all time 🤣🤣🤣

item.title: @elonmusk: Here's how you can Chibify your photos with@imagine. Try the Chibi template in the Grok app or on we...
item.description: Here's how you can Chibify your photos with@imagine. Try the Chibi template in the Grok app or on web.

item.title: @elonmusk: Space compute distilled Manufacture a 3 ton satellite with 100kW compute for $4m At $300 per kg it c...
item.description: Space compute distilled Manufacture a 3 ton satellite with 100kW compute for $4m At $300 per kg it costs $1m to launch At $12b per GW in terrestrial compute competition the satellite can pull in $1.2m per year 3 to 4 year payback with the additional year before orbital decay producing excess cashflow. Launch that same satellite with an AI model attached and you can generate $3.6m to $7.2m in annual revenue (dependent upon your expectations for AI model monetization growth.) Payback period drops from 3-4 years to .5 - 1.
